name: Aaron
goalsElaboration: I want to get stronger overall, incerease my bench, squat, and deadlift. I also want to stay healthy, good joint helath and flexibility. I also i would like to improve my cardio. Im training for a 10 miler, and want my time to be under 9:00/mile
experienceElaboration: ive been lifting for years, and only recently got into running in the last year. Currently running 20 miles a week around a 9:00 pace on avg. Max bench is 245, squat 365, and deadlift 425.
